siteDescription: Surveys that feel like conversations, not homework. Run polls, conversational surveys, and reward participation — inside Discord and on the web.

footer.brandDescription: The best survey bot for Discord communities. Run polls, collect more feedback in conversations, reward participants with XP and roles.

hero.title: GET TO KNOW YOUR
hero.subtitle: with surveys that feel like conversations, not homework.

features.title: YOU LEARN MORE WHEN PEOPLE ENJOY THE CONVERSATION.
features.subtitle: A wall of form fields feels like homework, and nobody wants more homework. With Subo, you ask questions in polls and friendly conversations — inside Discord and on the web.

list.title: ASK QUESTIONS
content: Survey convos: members answer Subo's questions in a private chat, inside your Discord server or on the web.
Discord polls: 1 question, multiple ways to answer and share results.
Content & action blocks: add a message, intro, GIF, or reward anywhere in the flow — no question required.

list.title: ENCOURAGE PARTICIPATION
content: Conditional rewards: assign roles, XP, or achievements based on how members answer — onboarding roles when someone completes onboarding, XP for quiz takers who got it right, beta access for the right candidates.
XP system: members earn points as they answer questions, level up to unlock roles.
Display a leaderboard with your most active participants
Share findings and answers from other participants in a click

list.title: ANALYZE & SHARE RESULTS
content: View aggregated results and individual responses.
Share/repost results
Let Subo summarize open answers with AI
Export the full data set for further analysis.

testimonialsSubTitle: ❤️ by mods, community managers, creators, entrepreneurs, product, UX and insights teams.

testimonialsList.text: I love Subo! Best survey bot ever! So easy and simple to use! Any issues are dealt with swiftly by an awesome customer support person!
testimonialsList.author: obimage

testimonialsList.text: Simple and so great to use
testimonialsList.author: Judge Jaxon

testimonialsList.text: Thank you for having the best poll bot out there, seriously. I have tried a lot of them. This is by far the best.
testimonialsList.author: YeahImShady

testimonialsList.text: This app is perfect. And the support they provide is also top notch. Highly recommended if you're doing any type of poll, survey, or voting
testimonialsList.author: .dutty

testimonialsList.text: This is the best polling solution on Discord currently. The setup is intuitive and not once caused me any issues. Having managed a server of over a thousand participants and needing something specific for anonymous voting with anonymous results, this was the perfect bot where no other poll solution bots did the job. It can listen to Integrations roles (something larger bots such as carl & MEE6 cannot do), you can set specific role restrictions, and even multiple choice surveys. Alongside that, its support team is top notch and attentive to its userbase's questions and concerns.
testimonialsList.author: DJTiki 🌴

testimonialsList.text: Your app has really ticked all the boxes for us and I've been impressed with the level of configuration options, it's the most full featured one that I've come across so, can't fault it!
testimonialsList.author: schmoopy101

testimonialsList.text: I am a server builder. i make them for friends that need them for work/ events/ community out reach to help their cause. This bot is amazingly well created! I use it a lot in servers! It is so easy to maneuver and use. It is great for people who are not used to bots/ discord. Makes it easy to learn how to use! I just recently discovered it a few weeks back, and have deleted all other survey bots and replaced it with this one haha.
testimonialsList.author: risingblossom92

testimonialsList.text: Used this bot with over 400 users to make a trivia month every day of last month and worked out great! I was making surveys with pictures, that had multiple options and then feeding the excel file I got from the bot at the end of the day to compile together a months worth of excel files, then made a leaderboard from that information!
testimonialsList.author: Bezarius

testimonialsList.text: Subo has been a joy to use since I have started my premium subscription. Recurring polls and other polls can run on a scheduled time frame that I need and the developers are actively working on the project. The developers frequently and quickly respond to tickets and helped me when there was a bug in the software due to the length of polls that I was running. Subo is a great alternative to Google Forms or Microsoft Forms for those who want their polls and surveys directly integrated as well as some ai analysis for longer surveys to identify what people want most in written responses.
testimonialsList.author: ryangrg422

testimonialsList.text: thanks for your brilliant app! I use it every week
testimonialsList.author: jpob

ctaTitle: START A CONVERSATION WITH YOUR COMMUNITY.
ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No setup hassle. Just jump in and play around with few limitations. Do more with paid plans when you're ready.
successDescription: Please contact the Team by email or on our Discord server with your Discord Server ID or name and we'll upgrade your server ASAP.

successSteps.title: Add Subo to Your Server
successSteps.desc: If you haven't already, invite Subo to your Discord server and accept the suggested permissions.

successSteps.title: Send your Server details to the Subo Team
successSteps.desc: Notify the Subo Team with your Discord Server ID or name. You can contact the Support Team by email or on our Discord server.

successSteps.title: Join Our Support Server
successSteps.desc: While you wait, join our support community to see examples, stay updated with new features or ask questions. Check our Tutorials to get started and make the most out of Subo.

successSteps.title: Verify that your Subscription is Active
successSteps.desc: Once you've sent your server details, the Subo Team will upgrade your server as soon as they can and will confirm your upgrade. Be patient, as it requires some manual verification. You can verify your upgrade was activated by using the /premium command in your Discord server.

faqList.question: Why do I need to choose between Stripe and Discord?
faqList.answer: We support Discord's native App Store, which is more convenient for many users, but the Discord App Store doesn't offer multiple server and annual subscriptions, so we also created a Stripe solution for that.

faqList.question: Why do I have to wait for my premium subscription to become active?
faqList.answer: Stripe collects your email address to create an account for you, but we can't connect this email address with your Discord server. This means we need to manually verify your account before activating your premium subscription. We intend to automate this process in the future, but for now, we appreciate your patience.

faqList.question: How do I find my server ID?
faqList.answer: You can find your server ID by right-clicking on your server name in Discord and selecting 'Copy Server ID'. If you don't see this option, you may need to enable Developer Mode in your Discord settings (which we recommend anyway).

faqList.question: How do I change or cancel a subscription?
faqList.answer: You can manage your subscription at any time via the Stripe Billing Portal or Discord Store, depending on how you upgraded. To access the Stripe Billing Portal, you will need to log in with the email address you used to pay for the upgrade. See links in footer.

faqList.question: What happens if I cancel my premium subscription?
faqList.answer: Once the end of your subscription period (month, year) comes, your bot will be switched back to the free version of Subo. You will still be able to use Subo, but with the limitations of the free tier.  If you have a project live, it may stop if you reach your maximum allowance for respondents or responses. If you have too many projects on your account, you may have to delete some before you are allowed to create new ones.

tiers.name: PREMIUM
tiers.description: For power users and mid-sized servers!

tiers.name: VIP
tiers.description: For larger servers and generous supporters!

tiers.name: CUSTOM

tableData:
Answers
Answer = Respondent x Question (e.g. 60 respondents answering 5 questions = 300 answers)

Total Projects
Total surveys & polls stored. Delete old projects to stay in a smaller tier.

Active Projects
Polls and surveys open or scheduled at the same time

Invitation / Thank You Customization
Customize invitations (footer, thumbnail, color), results and thank you messages

New response Notifications
New responses posted in a private channel with optional ping

Delete some responses
Delete some or all responses from a survey or poll
Advanced Script Builder: min/max open text length & numeric values

Skip Logic & Conditional Rewards
Branch questions and trigger XP, roles, or achievements based on answers

Action Block styling
Custom images and colors on mid-survey reward blocks

Advanced Expression Editor
Complex conditional logic for skip rules and rewards
Advanced Script Builder: customize 'Continue' button in content blocks

AI credits
Credits are needed to generate survey drafts with /draft and to summarize open-ended responses

✗
1 role server-wise for ever answering any poll/survey
Role rewards based on monthly XP

XP system
including leaderboard and up to 5 role rewards based on overall XP

surveyConvos.pageDescription: Subo turns surveys into friendly Discord conversations. Members answer questions one-on-one with the bot — no boring forms, higher completion rates, richer answers.
surveyConvos.heroSubtitle: Not a form. Not just a poll. A friendly one-on-one chat where your members actually want to respond.
whatBody: A survey convo is a private message conversation between your community member and Subo, the bot — right inside your Discord server or on the web.

Instead of sending members to a cold, generic form, Subo invites them to a chat. Questions appear one at a time, in a friendly message format. It feels like talking to someone, not filling out paperwork.
The result? Higher completion rates, richer answers, and members who actually enjoy the experience.

formsVsConvosItems.forms: No way to add context or instructions between questions
formsVsConvosItems.convos: Content blocks add intros, warnings, GIFs, or pauses anywhere in the flow
Members stay in Discord or use the web link

howSteps.title: You build the survey
howSteps.desc: Create a survey using the /survey command, or use /draft to let Subo's AI generate one based on your objectives. You can also build and manage surveys from the Subo web app.

howSteps.title: Subo invites your members
howSteps.desc: Subo posts an invite in your Discord server. Members click the invite and answer questions privately — right inside Discord, or via a web link.

howSteps.title: You get results instantly
howSteps.desc: View aggregated results, individual responses, and let Subo's AI summarize open-ended answers so you always know what your community thinks.

surveyConvos.questionTypesSubtitle: 4 question types for every kind of answer, content blocks for messages and pauses, and action blocks that reward participation.

questionTypesList.name: Single Choice
questionTypesList.desc: Pick one from multiple options (yes/no included)

questionTypesList.name: Content Block
questionTypesList.desc: Message, intro, GIF, or pause — no answer needed

questionTypesList.name: Action Block
questionTypesList.desc: Reward XP, roles, or achievements — conditionally on answers

surveyConvos.webTitle: ON DISCORD AND ON THE WEB
surveyConvos.webDesc: Survey convos work natively inside Discord — but Subo also supports a web-based survey experience. Admins choose whether a survey runs in Discord or on the web, and whether it's open to anyone or restricted to community members. Either way, you manage surveys, view results, and analyze data from the Subo web admin.
benefitsList: 👋 Greets members by name and rewards them as they go — not just at the finish line
📱 Works on mobile without any friction
🤫 Optional anonymous mode for honest, unfiltered feedback
🔀 Skip logic — skip irrelevant questions, and trigger rewards based on answers
📢 Content blocks — add an intro, key context, GIF, or mid-survey pause without asking a question
⏱️ Scheduled and recurring surveys run automatically
🏆 XP, roles, and achievements drive higher participation

about.pageTitle: About Subo | The Discord Survey Bot
about.pageDescription: Learn about Subo, the Discord survey and poll bot trusted by 15,000+ communities to collect feedback and engage members.
about.heroSubtitle: SU-BO. Survey Bot. Built for communities that want real answers.
storyBody: Subo was started in 2021 by a small team of pros 🤓 with decades of experience building survey platforms used by millions of global users — and by the world's top brands and researchers. We'd seen from the inside how survey tools were built: optimized for enterprise sales cycles, not for the people actually taking them. The experience was consistently bad, and we wanted to do something about it.

So we built Subo. Bootstrapped, self-funded, and fiercely independent — entirely focused on making feedback feel like a conversation rather than a chore. Discord was the perfect place to start: a platform where communities were already talking, and where the tools for listening were badly missing.

Since launch, Subo has grown to serve over 15,000 Discord servers — from gaming guilds to creator communities, DAOs, sports clubs, brand communities, and educational groups. We're a small team, and we intend to stay that way.

stats.label: Block types (4 question types, content, action)

differentiators.title: Conversational by design
differentiators.desc: Questions arrive as private messages — one at a time, in a chat format. Content blocks let you add intros, context, or pauses anywhere in the flow. Not a form page. A real conversation.

differentiators.title: AI-powered analysis
differentiators.desc: Subo uses AI to draft survey questions for you and to summarize open-ended responses. What used to take hours now takes seconds.

differentiators.title: Gamification built in
differentiators.desc: Members earn XP, level up, and unlock roles, XP, or achievements based on how they answer — not just whether they finish.

differentiators.title: Discord AND the web
differentiators.desc: Surveys work inside Discord and on the web. Members without Discord can participate too. You manage everything from the Subo web admin.

differentiators.title: Anonymous mode
differentiators.desc: When sensitive topics require honest answers, enable anonymous mode. Three options: full anonymity, identified, or partial — you choose the right level.

differentiators.title: Advanced targeting
differentiators.desc: Send surveys to specific roles, channels, or individuals. Use skip logic to branch questions based on prior answers. Built for precision.

about.missionBody: We believe every community deserves to be heard — and that the tools for listening should be as engaging as the communities themselves. Too often, an admin spends hours crafting a survey, hits send, and gets a handful of responses. Not because members don't care — because a wall of form fields feels like homework. Subo closes the gap between what a survey has always felt like and what a real conversation feels like.

faqs.question: What happens if I cancel my premium subscription?
faqs.answer: Once the end of your subscription period (month, year) comes, your bot will be switched back to the free version of Subo. You will still be able to use Subo, but with the limitations of the free tier.  If you have a project live, it may stop if you reach your maximum allowance for respondents or responses. If you have too many projects on your account, you may have to delete some before you are allowed to create new ones.

faqs.question: How do I change or cancel a subscription?
faqs.answer: You can manage your subscription at any time via the Stripe Billing Portal. To access it, log in with the email address you used to upgrade.

developerApi.title: BUILD AND AUTOMATE.
developerApi.subtitle: Automate surveys, pipe responses to your data stack, or let AI agents run your community research. All via a simple REST API.

features.title: AUTOMATE & COLLECT
content: Programmatically create surveys and polls
Auto-generate survey scripts from a plain-text description using AI
Open, close, clone, and schedule projects via API

features.title: REWARD & ANALYZE
content: Retrieve respondent answers in real time
Manage member XP, access levels, achievement and community settings
Get aggregated stats, distributions, and AI-generated summaries

features.title: INTEGRATE & EXTEND
content: Subscribe to webhook events for real-time data pipelines
Pipe responses to your data stack, CRM, or analytics tools
Let AI agents run surveys and retrieve results autonomously
